title: Contact
connection_pending: Connection pending. You cannot chat yet.

remove_modal.title: Remove contact?
remove_modal.confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from your contacts? This will also delete all messages and discussions with this contact. This action cannot be undone.
remove_modal.failed: Failed to delete contact. Please try again.
remove_modal.rename_failed: Failed to rename contact. Please try again.

new_contact.title: New contact
new_contact.address_mns_helper: Enter a Gossip ID or MNS domain (e.g., alice.massa)
new_contact.default_message: Hi! I'm {{username}} and I'd like to connect with you.
new_contact.default_message_anonymous: Hi! I'd like to connect with you.
new_contact.share_username_hint: The recipient will see this name when they receive your request

privacy_notice.title: Privacy notice
privacy_notice.body: This message is sent with your contact request announcement and has reduced privacy compared to regular Gossip messages. Unlike regular messages, if your keys are compromised in the future, this message could be decrypted. Use it for introductions or context, but avoid sharing sensitive information. Send private details through regular messages after the contact accepts your request.

message_placeholder: Introduce yourself or add context to your contact request...
user_id_helper: User ID is a unique 32-byte identifier
